channel.title: home on Lindemann
channel.description: Recent content in home on Lindemann

item.title: About
item.description: Who I am a husband and father of two. I am an engineer, entrepreneur and computer scientist. I was born in France in the early 1980’s. Too long ago already. Where I live in Lausanne, Switzerland. I also lived and worked in France, in Vietnam, in Malaysia and in the U.S. I have been working remotely or with distributed teams for 15+ years. What When I am not busy teaching my kids how to use a glue gun, I manage tech organizations, mostly building or turning them around.

item.title: Home
item.description: If you landed on this page, then we probably are connected in some way. Mention your discovery next time we meet in person and I’ll buy you a drink. Or some chocolate. If we meet in France or Switzerland, definitely go for the chocolate. Until then, take care of yourself and the ones you love. Best, ML
